status.description: The status of the response, indicating success or failure.

count.description: The number of items returned in the current response.

total_count.description: The total number of items available in the dataset.

offset.description: The offset from the start of the dataset, used for pagination.

next_page.description: The URL to fetch the next page of results.

prev_page.description: The URL to fetch the previous page of results.
